verdict.summary: Round 2 resolves the prior major finding. The page and data-layer contract now accurately narrow the promise to tracked future work, explicitly disclose deferred/untracked rows, and add a data-level test covering every PARTIAL/GAP row. The previously cited query-time rewriting, SWRL ingestion, and ontology/shape-editor rows now satisfy that contract through explicit deferred/not-beaded language, consistent with the relevant design-record entries. The test also validates bead syntax and per-row uniqueness; its real-path import is wired through the site's existing TypeScript test loader. No correctness, soundness, security, or honesty defect remains in the diff.
